CustomField.formula: IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(Project__r.Project__c,'The Landmark'),ISPICKVAL(Project__r.Project__c,'Florenzza')),Basic_Cost1__c + PLC_Charges__c + Car_Scooter_Parking__c + Club_Amenities_Charges__c + Water_Electricity_Charges__c + Generator_STP__c + Floor_Rise__c,Basic_Cost1__c + Car_Scooter_Parking__c + Club_Amenities_Charges__c + IF(Water_and_Electricity_Charges__c != null,(Water_and_Electricity_Charges__c * Rate_per_sqft__c),Water_Electricity_Charges__c ) + Generator_STP__c )
CustomField.label: Total Cost
